role: Scripts and automation utilities for the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: Collectively, these scripts automate build processes, demo generation, end-to-end verification, release gating, database schema migration, and protocol asset validation to support the development and release workflow.

children.role: Build script for the ArchSpine project — orchestrates compilation, asset copying, and cleanup for distribution.
Demonstration script for the ArchSpine project's CLI workflow
End-to-end verification script for ASTExtractor multi-language export extraction
Demonstration script for generating a visual preview of the ArchSpine CLI workflow
Operational script documentation for placeholder package publishing
Release gate automation script for the ArchSpine project
Database schema migration script for the ArchSpine cache system
Validation script for protocol assets in ArchSpine project
